fields.name: Veg Dal Bhat Set
fields.description: Traditional Nepali thali with steamed rice, slow-cooked yellow dal, seasonal saag, mixed achar, and a side of papad.

fields.name: Chicken Dal Bhat Set
fields.description: Classic Nepali thali with fragrant rice, rich chicken curry, hearty dal, mixed seasonal vegetables, and tangy homemade pickle.

fields.name: Mutton Dal Bhat Set
fields.description: Slow-braised mutton curry with melt-off-the-bone tenderness, served alongside steamed rice, golden dal, sautéed greens, and spiced achar.

fields.name: Chicken Mo:Mo
fields.description: Handcrafted steamed dumplings stuffed with seasoned minced chicken, served with smoked tomato chutney.

fields.name: Chicken Schezwan Mo:Mo
fields.description: Crispy tossed dumplings glazed in a bold, fiery schezwan sauce — a street-food favourite with serious heat.

fields.name: Chicken Kothey Mo:Mo
fields.description: Golden pan-fried dumplings with a crisp base and juicy chicken filling, served with house dipping sauce.

fields.name: Chicken Thukpa
fields.description: Hearty Tibetan noodle soup with hand-shredded chicken, fresh greens, and a deeply spiced, aromatic broth.

fields.name: Clear Chicken Soup
fields.description: Light, golden chicken broth slow-cooked with ginger, garlic, and garden herbs — comforting and restorative.

fields.name: Veg Mo:Mo
fields.description: Delicate steamed dumplings filled with spiced mixed vegetables and herbs, served with tomato sesame chutney.

fields.name: Veg Kothey Mo:Mo
fields.description: Pan-fried vegetable dumplings with a beautifully crisped bottom, served with house dipping sauce.

fields.name: Wai Wai Sadeko
fields.description: Crunchy Wai Wai noodles tossed with red onion, tomato, green chilli, fresh coriander, and a zingy lime-spice dressing.

fields.name: Veg Thukpa
fields.description: Tibetan-style noodle soup brimming with seasonal vegetables, fresh herbs, and hand-pulled noodles in a flavourful clear broth.

fields.name: Chicken Hot & Sour Soup
fields.description: A bold Chinese-inspired broth loaded with tender chicken strips, silken tofu, wood-ear mushrooms, and swirls of egg ribbon.

fields.name: Cream of Mushroom Soup
fields.description: Velvety blended mushroom soup finished with fresh cream, garlic, and a hint of thyme — earthy and satisfying.

fields.name: Coca-Cola
fields.description: Ice-cold classic Coke, served chilled.

fields.name: Sprite
fields.description: Crisp, refreshing lemon-lime soda, served chilled.

fields.name: Milkshake
fields.description: Thick, creamy blended milkshake made with fresh  fruit and full-cream milk.

fields.name: Milk Tea
fields.description: Classic Nepali-style milk tea brewed strong with tea leaves, whole milk, and a hint of cardamom.

fields.name: Honey Lemon Tea
fields.description: Warm, soothing tea with raw honey, fresh lemon juice, and a touch of ginger.

fields.name: Fresh Orange Juice
fields.description: Freshly squeezed orange juice, served chilled and pulpy.

fields.name: Chocolate Brownie
fields.description: Warm, dense chocolate brownie with a fudgy centre — served with a dusting of icing sugar and a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

fields.name: Kheer
fields.description: Traditional Nepali rice pudding slow-cooked in full-cream milk, sweetened with sugar, and perfumed with cardamom, saffron, and crushed nuts.

fields.name: Ice Cream
fields.description: Two generous scoops of premium ice cream — ask your server for today's flavours.
